title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Navin's

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Navin's
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Real Estate Agent to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
